subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Though thou hast departed hence, thou art ever before Mine eyes, and the purpose of thy journey was [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی هر چند از اینجا رفتی ولی همیشه پیش نظری و مقصود از سفر شما این بود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @review of publications, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
